name_for_human: SpyCloud Darknet & Identity Threat Exposure Intelligence
description_for_human: Complete Microsoft Security Copilot integration for SpyCloud darknet & identity threat exposure intelligence. Includes an autonomous investigation agent with 17 specialized sub-agents, a KQL plugin with 85+ promptbook skills, and a REST API plugin with 12 direct API skills — providing comprehensive coverage across 145+ deployed Microsoft Sentinel resources including 49 analytics rules, 28 hunting queries, 10 playbooks, 4 watchlists, 3 workbooks, and 3 Jupyter notebooks. Enhanced with Defender XDR, Intune, CASB, Entra ID, and Compass deep investigation capabilities.
description_for_model: SpyCloud Security Copilot plugin for investigating dark web credential exposure, infostealer infections, compromised identities, device forensics, and automated remediation across Microsoft Sentinel, Defender XDR, Intune, Entra ID, and CASB. Provides 17 specialized sub-agents covering UEBA behavioral analysis, Fusion multistage attacks, TI enrichment, session cookie theft, lateral movement, data exfiltration, ransomware assessment, identity risk scoring, supply chain exposure, dark web monitoring, Defender XDR endpoint investigation, Intune device compliance, CASB and cloud application security, Compass deep infostealer investigation, and cross-platform security correlation. Query 7 SpyCloud custom tables plus 20+ Microsoft native tables for comprehensive threat intelligence.
